question_a: On fixed spread_expand_chg8 short (next_open), which trend exits keep train PF@maker≥1.3 without single-month concentration?
question_b: Do owner_side=short oracle entries + same trend exits beat the causal spread_expand short rule under identical exits?
verdict_a: A 稳健过线（PF≥1.3 且非少数月份独撑）
verdict_b: B 手标 short+趋势出显著好于规则
holdout_suggestion: 值得申请 holdout#7 对照一次（仅建议，本脚本不跑）

discipline.entry_fill_note: p_entry_timing_close_vs_next: close≈next for spread-short; keep next_open
discipline.fragile_rule: top2 months share of sum_net > 0.6 OR <2 months with PF≥1.3
discipline.theme: A robustness + B oracle vs rule; short focus
